I have noticed a few issues with order execution on Kite. In one case, I placed a buy order with a limit price of ₹155.20 and a trigger price of ₹155.30, but the order was executed when the price was around ₹155.00. This was unexpected and needs clarification.Similarly, I placed a stop-loss at ₹140.00, but it was triggered when the price was around ₹140.20. This behavior can be confusing for traders.I request the Kite team to improve transparency around order execution.

Dear Zerodha Team, I would like to request the implementation of an auto-save feature for chart drawings in the Kite platform.
